rows.en: Play Lamb Lamb
Play Spoiled by Tarkan
Smile Play from Sezen Aksu
Burn Everything from Smoke Play
Open Sila's State of the State song
Forgive from the Musicians
Play Ezhel's Nights song
Open the Lord of the Rings

rows.tr: Neva'nın doğum günü 12 Mart, aklında tut
rows.en: Neva's birthday is March 12, keep it in mind
Remind me to call Ayhan at 7 p.m.
When is Neva's math test

rows.tr: Ayhan'ın telefon numarası neydi, hafızana bak
rows.en: What was Ayhan's phone number, look at your memory

rows.tr: bundan sonra bana Ayhan Bey diye hitap et
rows.en: From now on, call me Mr. Ayhan.
How many games are finished
How is the weather in Şanlıurfa
I ate Alexander at noon, write to my diet

rows.tr: alışveriş listesine Torku süt ve Eti bisküvi ekle
rows.en: Add Torku milk and meat biscuits to the shopping list

rows.tr: cumartesi Neva'yı Bostancı'dan almam gerek, hatırlat
rows.en: I need to get Neva from Bostancı on Saturday, remind me.
The shop in Kadıköy is called Chiya, remember

rows.tr: Atatürk Havalimanı ile ilgili haberleri ara
rows.en: Search for news about Atatürk Airport
